name: Account Created
description: Fired when a new user successfully completes registration via the create-account form. Captures signup method and whether it was email/password or OAuth.

name: User Signed In
description: Fired when a user successfully authenticates via credentials (email/password) or OAuth providers (Google, GitHub). Captures the sign-in method used.

name: Todo Completed
description: Fired when a user checks off an individual todo item within a todo set. Captures which set the todo belongs to and the todo title.

name: Todo Set Finished
description: Fired when all todos within a single set are marked complete. Captures the set name and total todo count, enabling funnel/retention analysis on habit completion.
